ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pattern */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename associated with the pattern */,
  "pattern_text" TEXT /* Text of the pattern used in training */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic of the pattern */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the template the pattern is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the pattern (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pattern */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the pattern was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the pattern */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the pattern was last modified */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the pattern has been used */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the pattern based on user feedback */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the pattern is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patterns_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patterns_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patterns_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patterns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_text" TEXT /* Text of the template used in patterns */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the template */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was last modified */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the template has been used */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the template based on user feedback */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the template is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the topic was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the topic */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the topic was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the topic is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pattern_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pattern being used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the pattern */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the pattern was accessed */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., training, testing) */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the pattern has been used by the user */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date when the pattern was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_usage_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES patterns ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pattern_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pattern the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the pattern */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_versions_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES patterns ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the pattern */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pattern being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES patterns ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pattern being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numeric rating (e.g., 1-5) given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES patterns ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_types" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status type */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pattern that encountered an error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message detailing the issue */,
  "logged_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was logged */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the error */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the error */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES patterns ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pattern_templates" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pattern */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_templates_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_templates_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES patterns ("pattern_id")
)
